$comment: Selector registry for the budget app. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label; Maestro full-matches, so anchors that are a substring of a longer label are wrapped in .*). Anchors target the seeded budget (src/qa/fixtures.ts) and the add-expense flow. The amount keypad key '5' sets a $5 expense; the default category (Groceries) is pre-selected, so the journey only types a note and asserts it on the home list.

chart-center.note: the donut chart centre label (i18n home.spent) — present once the period view has rendered

add-expense.note: the − FAB on home (a11y label home.addExpense). Opens AddTransaction in expense mode.

new-expense-title.note: AddTransaction header title when adding an expense (i18n tx.newExpense)

key-5.note: the '5' key on the amount keypad (a11y label '5') — sets a $5 amount

note-input.note: the note TextInput on AddTransaction (placeholder tx.notePlaceholder 'What was it? (optional)')

save-button.note: the save action in the AddTransaction header (a11y label tx.save)

added-tx.note: a transaction NOT in the seed; added by the core flow. assertNot before / assert after = the write + chart/balance refresh landed.
